LanguageData.SD_VoiceEvent_Selected.label: selected
LanguageData.SD_VoiceEvent_Selected.description: Triggered when the pawn is selected by the player.
LanguageData.SD_VoiceEvent_Drafted.label: drafted
LanguageData.SD_VoiceEvent_Drafted.description: Triggered when the pawn is drafted.
LanguageData.SD_VoiceEvent_MoveOrder.label: move order
LanguageData.SD_VoiceEvent_MoveOrder.description: Triggered when the player gives a drafted pawn a move order.
LanguageData.SD_VoiceEvent_AttackOrder.label: attack order
LanguageData.SD_VoiceEvent_AttackOrder.description: Triggered when the player gives a drafted pawn an attack order.
LanguageData.SD_VoiceEvent_SpamClick.label: repeated-click easter egg
LanguageData.SD_VoiceEvent_SpamClick.description: Triggered when the player rapidly clicks the pawn beyond the configured threshold.
